pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose your plan and start your AI journey

free.name: Free
features: Free models (Llama, Qwen open source series)

proMonthly.name: Pro Monthly
features: All models (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini Pro, etc.)

proYearly.name: Pro Yearly
features: Custom model routing strategies by use case

enterprise.name: Enterprise
features: Centralized API Key management & access control

pricing.note: Prices exclude applicable taxes. Usage measured in Tokens.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to commonly asked questions

items.question: What are Tokens? How is usage calculated?
items.answer: Tokens are the basic units that large language models use to process text. Generally, 1 Chinese character equals about 1.5-2 Tokens, and 1 English word equals about 1-2 Tokens. You can view your Token consumption in real-time on the usage dashboard.

items.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, while downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

items.question: What happens when I exceed my usage limit?
items.answer: When your monthly Token quota is exhausted, Free plan users will be unable to continue using the service. Paid plan users can purchase additional usage packs or wait for the next month's quota to refresh.

items.question: What payment methods are supported?
items.answer: We support Alipay, WeChat Pay, and enterprise bank transfers. Enterprise customers can also apply for monthly or quarterly billing.

items.question: What's the difference between Enterprise and Custom plans?
items.answer: Enterprise is suitable for small to medium teams with standardized enterprise features. Custom is designed for large enterprises, supporting private deployment, custom SLAs, and dedicated technical support, with flexible customization based on business needs.

items.question: Is there a free trial available?
items.answer: We offer a Free plan to experience basic features. Paid plans don't have a trial period, but you can upgrade from Free at any time, and request a refund within the first month if not satisfied.
